title: Slay the Spire 2 roadmap - all updates coming in 2026
author: editor@pcgamesn.com
contents:
Looking for a Slay the Spire 2 roadmap? We now have an official roadmap and know what to expect from future updates and content, though Mega Crit are holding off on announcing any dates. Of course, there are some things fans would love to see make its way from the first game into Slay the Spire 2, but here's everything we know that's coming.

There's already a lot to explore in the early access version of Slay the Spire 2, with five playable characters, three acts, and ten Ascension levels to chip away at. Within each act there are also events like the Colossal Flower event and rewards and items, like the Lantern Key and Byrdonis Egg. While there's plenty to chew through, here's what's on the way in future updates.

Read the rest of the story...
